slides.title: BruAI: AI Medication Assistant
slides.subtitle: Focus Group Session  ·  Ministry of Health, Brunei Darussalam  ·  7 April 2026

slides.title: Welcome & Introductions
bullets: Welcome to the MOH POC Focus Group — evaluating BruAI, MOH's AI medication assistant in BruHealth.
Moderators from EVYD are present to observe the system, not to evaluate you personally.
This session runs approximately 1.5 hours: 4 scenarios → survey → open discussion.
ground_rules: There are no right or wrong answers
Please think aloud as you work through the tasks
All feedback is confidential and anonymised
You may stop or skip any task at any time

side_panel.text: Your feedback will shape the future of healthcare in Brunei.

slides.title: Session Purpose & Structure
slides.subtitle: What this session is — and is not — designed to evaluate

left.title: ✅  IN SCOPE
items: Usability and discoverability of the AI feature
Clarity and helpfulness of AI-generated responses
Task completion ease and user confidence
Perceived usefulness and relevance of BruAI
Trust and comfort with the AI assistant
Overall user experience across the 4 scenarios

right.title: 🚫  OUT OF SCOPE
items: Clinical accuracy or medical validation
Personalised medical advice or diagnosis
Real patient data (test accounts only)
System performance benchmarking
Comparison with other health apps
Final product assessment (POC stage only)

cards.text: Gather actionable insights on user interaction with the BruAI medication assistant
Evaluate usability and intuitiveness of AI-powered medication features
Assess discoverability — can users find and access the chatbot naturally?
Observe real user interactions across diverse medication workflows
Gather qualitative feedback on experience, friction points, and improvements
Assess perceived value of AI medication guidance among healthcare staff

slides.title: What We Are Measuring
slides.subtitle: Feedback collected via structured survey at the end of each scenario
slides.footnote: Survey rating scales: 1–5 for usability · 0–10 for satisfaction & likelihood

criteria.label: DISCOVERABILITY
criteria.text: Ease of finding and accessing the AI feature within BruHealth

criteria.label: TASK COMPLETION
criteria.text: Ease of completing tasks through the BruAI chatbot

criteria.label: RESPONSE QUALITY
criteria.text: Usefulness, clarity, and relevance of AI-generated responses

criteria.label: SATISFACTION
criteria.text: General satisfaction and likelihood to use BruAI regularly

slides.title: BruAI Scope at a Glance
slides.subtitle: How the AI responds to different types of questions

tiers.label: IN SCOPE — AI will answer
tiers.desc: Medication information, logging medications, drug interactions, storage & disposal
tiers.example: e.g. "What is Omeprazole for?"  ·  "Log my new medication"  ·  "Can I take Panadol with Ibuprofen?"

tiers.label: SOFT OUT-OF-SCOPE — AI will acknowledge and redirect
tiers.desc: Dose adjustments, substitutions, pregnancy & breastfeeding considerations
tiers.example: e.g. "Can I take a higher dose?"  ·  "Is there a cheaper alternative?"

tiers.label: HARD OUT-OF-SCOPE — AI will decline and explain why
tiers.desc: Diagnosis, prescribing, medical procedures, legal advice, insurance
tiers.example: e.g. "Do I have diabetes?"  ·  "Prescribe me something for my pain"

tiers.label: RED FLAG — AI will escalate immediately
tiers.desc: Medical emergency → Call 999   ·   Mental health crisis → Talian Harapan 145
tiers.example: e.g. "I took too many pills"  ·  "I want to harm myself"

panels.title: AI DISCLAIMER
items: BruAI provides general information only — NOT personalised medical advice
This is a Proof-of-Concept — NOT intended for clinical decisions
AI responses may not be 100% accurate — always consult a healthcare professional
Moderators are present — raise your hand if any AI response causes concern

panels.title: DATA PRIVACY
items: Test accounts only — no real patient data is involved in this session
All feedback is anonymised and used for research purposes only
Observations are confidential and not linked to individual identities
Participation is voluntary — you may stop at any time with no consequence

slides.title: Handling Unsafe or Incorrect AI Responses

steps.bold: Do NOT act on the response
steps.normal: if it seems incorrect or potentially harmful
and guide you to continue the session
of the incorrect or unsafe AI response

steps.bold: Send to the EVYD WhatsApp group

steps.normal: what happened, when, and the scenario you were in

slides.warning: ⚠️  Do not use or share any AI response you believe to be incorrect, harmful, or clinically inappropriate.

slides.title: AI POC Scope — 4 Scenarios
slides.subtitle: Each scenario is moderated · Think aloud as you interact with BruAI

scenarios.title: Logging a New Medication
scenarios.desc: Add a new medication to BruHealth via photo capture or manual entry. Review the AI-generated medication card and check all details.

scenarios.title: Inquiring About Medication Usage
scenarios.desc: Ask BruAI about Omeprazole — what it is used for, how to take it, and any important precautions to be aware of.

scenarios.title: Medication Guidance (OTC Safety Check)
scenarios.desc: Check whether an over-the-counter remedy is safe to take alongside your current medications.

scenarios.title: Storage & Disposal Guidance
scenarios.desc: Ask BruAI how to safely store your medication at home and how to dispose of it responsibly when it expires.

slides.title: How to Submit the Survey
slides.subtitle: Complete after all 4 scenarios · Takes approximately 5–7 minutes

steps.title: Open the Survey Link
steps.desc: Scan the QR code on the right, or open the link shared by your moderator on the day

steps.title: Answer Each Section
steps.desc: Complete all 4 scenario sections based on your experience during the session

steps.title: Use the Rating Scales
steps.desc: 1–5 for usability and ease · 0–10 for satisfaction and likelihood to use

steps.title: Submit and Confirm
steps.desc: Submit the form and inform your moderator — they will record your completion

slides.qr_hint:
Moderator will circulate
to assist with submission

slides.title: Thank You for Participating
slides.subtitle: You are now free to interact with BruAI directly — explore beyond the 4 scenarios.

actions.title: Explore Freely
actions.desc: Ask BruAI anything related to medication — try topics beyond the 4 scenarios.

actions.title: Think Aloud
actions.desc: Tell us what you notice as you interact — what surprises you, what feels natural.
